name: capture_snapshot
_note: worldmodel.capture_snapshot (LENS_ACTIONS handler). Captures a full per-user world-state snapshot (deep-copied entities + relations) and returns its id + counts; capturing an empty model is valid (entityCount/relationCount 0), so a bare {} still returns ok:true — degrade-graceful, never no_db. The label is bounded to 120 chars (str guard) and defaults to a timestamped label. LENS_ACTIONS-served via /api/lens/run's LENS_ACTIONS-first dispatch; the diff/restore round-trip is pinned in server/tests/worldmodel-lens-macros.test.js, not by the MACROS-only assassin.
